description: Conservative detection/review pack for Delphi PDF, document, and imaging component libraries. Image/PDF viewers and editors are feature-rich controls with platform, codec, printing, and licensing concerns, so this pack reports them and preserves only clearly nonvisual helper components with review.

rules.manual_review_reason: Gnostice PDF viewer UI requires PDF-library-specific FMX replacement or manual redesign.
PDF document component may be preservable if the target owns compatible packages; review licensing, deployment, and platform support.
PDF printing is platform-specific and must be reviewed manually.
PDF outline/navigation UI requires manual FMX replacement.
PDF search behavior depends on the document engine and UI integration.
ImageEn visual image viewer/editor behavior requires manual FMX replacement or package-specific support review.
Multi-image thumbnail/browser UI requires manual FMX replacement.
Vector/image editing features do not map safely to stock FMX controls.
Layered image editing UI requires package-specific migration.
Image processing component may be preservable, but package/platform support and bitmap type usage must be reviewed.
Image I/O may be preservable, but codec deployment, file paths, and target-platform support require review.
Folder/image browser UI requires manual FMX replacement and platform storage review.
Data-aware image viewing requires dataset, blob field, and LiveBindings review.
Data-aware thumbnail browsing requires manual dataset and UI migration.
Generic PDF viewer class detected; confirm actual vendor/library and choose an FMX-compatible PDF strategy.
Generic PDF document class detected; verify library, licensing, deployment, and platform support.
